conversation.description: Top-level fields describing the conversation as a whole

mapping.description: Fields within each node of the mapping dictionary

message.description: Fields within the message object of each mapping node

author.description: Fields within the author object of a message

content.description: Fields within the content object of a message

metadata.description: Fields within the metadata object of a message

field_descriptions._id: MongoDB ObjectId for the conversation document in OpenAI's database
field_descriptions.conversation_id: Unique identifier (UUID) for the conversation, used for API calls and sharing
field_descriptions.create_time: Unix timestamp indicating when the conversation was first created
field_descriptions.update_time: Unix timestamp indicating when the conversation was last modified
field_descriptions.current_node: UUID of the currently active/last message node in the conversation
field_descriptions.mapping: Dictionary mapping node UUIDs to their message node objects, containing the full conversation tree
field_descriptions.moderation_results: Array of content moderation check results for messages in the conversation
field_descriptions.plugin_ids: Array of plugin IDs that were used or invoked during this conversation
field_descriptions.title: Display title of the conversation, shown in the conversation list
field_descriptions.type: Conversation type indicator (e.g., 'chat' for standard conversations)
field_descriptions.children: Array of UUIDs pointing to child message nodes in the conversation tree
field_descriptions.id: UUID identifier for this specific message node
field_descriptions.message: The message object containing author, content, and metadata
field_descriptions.parent: UUID of the parent message node; null for the root message of a conversation
field_descriptions.author: Object containing the author name and role (user, assistant, system)
field_descriptions.channel: Channel identifier where the message was sent
field_descriptions.content: Message content object with content_type, parts, and optional text
field_descriptions.end_turn: Boolean indicating if this message ends the current conversation turn
field_descriptions.recipient: Recipient identifier for the message (e.g., 'all' for broadcast)
field_descriptions.weight: Weight value affecting model sampling probability for responses
field_descriptions.role: Role of the message author: 'user', 'assistant', 'system', or 'tool'
field_descriptions.name: Author identifier name (e.g., 'assistant' or user's identifier)
field_descriptions.language: Language code for code blocks or multilingual content (e.g., 'python')
field_descriptions.parts: Array of content parts, typically text strings or code blocks
field_descriptions.response_format_name: Name of the response format used (e.g., 'json', 'markdown')
field_descriptions.text: Text content string for simple text-based messages
field_descriptions.user_instructions: Instructions provided by the user for this specific message
field_descriptions.user_profile: User profile information when context is provided
